name: Operation.ProgressBar
summary: The ProgressBar class implements progress bar with cancel button.

constructors.name: Operation.ProgressBar
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Operation.ProgressBar class

methods.name: Canceled
methods.summary: Check if cancel has been pressed.

methods.name: Close
methods.summary: Close progress bar. Can be called even if Display was not successful.

methods.name: Display
methods.summary: Display progress bar dialog with cancel button. Display will fail if progress bar is already displayed.

methods.name: SetProgress
methods.summary: Update status information on the progress bar.
